---
title: "Home Page"
date: today
author: "Kelly Liang"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

## About Me 

I am an undergraduate student with a growing passion for marketing. This portfolio showcases the skills and projects I have developed through coursework, with a focus on R, Quarto, and Shiny.

## 🛠️ Skills

-   R / RStudio
-   Quarto
-   Shiny
-   Shinylive
-   ggplot2
-   Tidyverse
-   R Markdown
-   Quarto Dashboards
-   Data Visualization
-   Marketing Analytics

## 🎓 Education

**Bachelor of Science — Marketing Management**\
Cal Poly Pomona\
Expected Graduation: 2027

**Relevant Coursework**\
Marketing Research · Data Visualization · Business Analytics
